title: Google Drive CLI and API Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and code snippets for Google Drive API and CLI usage.

commands.description: Download a file from Google Drive

commands.description: Install Google Client Library for Python
commands.scenario: Install Google Client Library for Python

commands.command:
from google_auth_oauthlib.flow import InstalledAppFlow
flow = InstalledAppFlow.from_client_secrets_file('credentials.json', SCOPES)
creds = flow.run_local_server(port=0)

results = service.files().list(pageSize=10, fields="nextPageToken, files(id, name)").execute()
items = results.get('files', [])

commands.command:
request = service.files().get_media(fileId=file_id)
fh = io.BytesIO()
downloader = MediaIoBaseDownload(fh, request)
done = False
while done is False:
    status, done = downloader.next_chunk()
